tier_rationale: Growth-stage agencies at the scaling inflection point. Highest ACV tier. Multi-seat expansion potential. Will build case studies Echoes can amplify.
tagline: An agency owner scaling past 5 clients whose team can't keep up with demand.

psychographics.self_identity: I'm building something that outgrows me.
psychographics.core_belief: Systems and playbooks are what separate a firm from a founder hustling.
psychographics.fear: Hitting the ceiling where every new client makes margin worse.
psychographics.ambition: $5M run rate, 40%+ margin, without the founder being the bottleneck.
psychographics.status_anxiety: Being dismissed as 'just another agency' by bigger players.

pain_points.pain: Team can't keep up with client demand
Delivery playbooks don't exist or aren't enforced

desired_outcomes.outcome: Team produces 2x the output with the same headcount
Standardized delivery playbooks every PM uses

buying_triggers.trigger: Just lost a key account due to delivery slip
Senior team member burning out or threatening to leave
Considering raising prices but scared of churn
About to take on a big client and nervous about capacity

objections.counter_angle: EPOS is the connective tissue — it doesn't replace, it conducts.

objections.objection: Our delivery is too bespoke to systemize
objections.counter_angle: Start with one service line; prove margin lift; expand.

objections.objection: Cost per seat adds up fast
objections.counter_angle: One rescued client account pays for the year.

objections.objection: Change management with the team will be painful

communication_preferences.length: Medium-long — case studies, frameworks, ROI calculators
communication_preferences.vocabulary: Margin, utilization, throughput, delivery, retention, LTV:CAC, playbook
communication_preferences.proof_type: Named agency case studies with margin and revenue numbers

conversion_path.awareness: LinkedIn case study — named agency, margin delta numbers
conversion_path.consideration: Mirror Report with quantified recoverable margin
conversion_path.decision: 4-8 week installation engagement with margin guarantee
conversion_path.retention: Quarterly margin reviews + new playbook rollouts
